title: F6: Line Controller to Main Unit Communication Fault
summary: Fault code F6 indicates a communication failure between the line controller and the main unit.

structured_payload.meaning: Communication fault between line controller and main unit

title: ECXX: Slave Unit XX Communication Fault
summary: Fault code ECXX (XX=00-15) indicates a communication failure with a specific slave unit.

structured_payload.meaning: Communication fault with slave unit XX

title: EC78: Communication Fault with All Slave Units
summary: Fault code EC78 indicates a communication failure with all slave units.

structured_payload.meaning: Communication fault with all slave units

title: 16/ER16: Compressor Overload (Single System)
summary: Fault code 16 (line controller) or ER16 (unit display) indicates a compressor overload for a single system.
evidence_quote: 线控器显示            单系统显示： 16

title: 16/17: Compressor Overload (Dual System)
summary: For dual systems, fault code 16 indicates overload for system 1, and 17 for system 2.

structured_payload.meaning: Compressor overload for system 1 (16) and system 2 (17)

title: 17/ER17: Fan Overload (Single System)
summary: Fault code 17 (line controller) or ER17 (unit display) indicates a fan overload for a single system.
evidence_quote: 线控器显示            单系统显示： 17

title: 33/35: High Discharge Temperature (Dual System)
summary: For dual systems, fault code 33 indicates high discharge temperature for system 1, and 35 for system 2.

structured_payload.meaning: High discharge temperature for system 1 (33) and system 2 (35)

title: 18/ER18: Water Pump Overload
summary: Fault code 18 (line controller) or ER18 (unit display) indicates a water pump overload.

title: 19/ER19: Water Pressure Differential Switch Alarm
summary: Fault code 19 (line controller) or ER19 (unit display) indicates a water pressure differential switch alarm.

title: 20/ER20: High Pressure Fault (Single System)
summary: Fault code 20 (line controller) or ER20 (unit display) indicates a high pressure fault for a single system.
evidence_quote: 线控器显示            单系统显示： 20

title: 20/24: High Pressure Fault (Dual System)
summary: For dual systems, fault code 20 indicates high pressure fault for system 1, and 24 for system 2.

structured_payload.meaning: High pressure fault for system 1 (20) and system 2 (24)

title: 21/ER21: Low Pressure Fault (Single System)
summary: Fault code 21 (line controller) or ER21 (unit display) indicates a low pressure fault for a single system.
evidence_quote: 线控器显示            单系统显示： 21

title: 21/36: Low Pressure Fault (Dual System)
summary: For dual systems, fault code 21 indicates low pressure fault for system 1, and 36 for system 2.

structured_payload.meaning: Low pressure fault for system 1 (21) and system 2 (36)

title: 23/ER23: System Fault (Single System Only)
summary: Fault code 23 (line controller) or ER23 (unit display) indicates a system fault, applicable only to single systems.

title: 25/ER25: Low Leaving Water Temperature
summary: Fault code 25 (line controller) or ER25 (unit display) indicates low leaving water temperature.

title: 26/ER26: Water System Electric Heater Overload
summary: Fault code 26 (line controller) or ER26 (unit display) indicates a water system electric heater overload.

title: 27/ER27: Ambient Temperature Too High or Too Low
summary: Fault code 27 (line controller) or ER27 (unit display) indicates ambient temperature is too high or too low.

structured_payload.meaning: Ambient temperature too high or too low

title: 28/ER28: Emergency Operation Function Activated (Single System Only)
summary: Fault code 28 (line controller) or ER28 (unit display) indicates the emergency operation function is activated, applicable only to single systems.

structured_payload.meaning: Emergency operation function activated (single system only)

title: 29/ER29: Low System Superheat (Single System)
summary: Fault code 29 (line controller) or ER29 (unit display) indicates low system superheat for a single system.
evidence_quote: 线控器显示            单系统显示： 29

title: 29/37: Low System Superheat (Dual System)
summary: For dual systems, fault code 29 indicates low superheat for system 1, and 37 for system 2.

structured_payload.meaning: Low system superheat for system 1 (29) and system 2 (37)

title: 31/ER31: Master-Slave Communication Fault
summary: Fault code 31 (line controller) or ER31 (unit display) indicates a master-slave communication fault.

title: 32/ER32: High Suction Temperature (Single System)
summary: Fault code 32 (line controller) or ER32 (unit display) indicates high suction temperature for a single system.
evidence_quote: 线控器显示          单系统显示： 32

title: 32/34: High Suction Temperature (Dual System)
summary: For dual systems, fault code 32 indicates high suction temperature for system 1, and 34 for system 2.

structured_payload.meaning: High suction temperature for system 1 (32) and system 2 (34)

title: 38/39: Refrigerant Leak (Dual System Only)
summary: Fault codes 38 and 39 indicate a refrigerant leak, applicable only to dual systems.

title: 53/ER53: Low Pressure Sensor Fault (Single System)
summary: Fault code 53 (line controller) or ER53 (unit display) indicates a low pressure sensor fault for a single system.
evidence_quote: 线控器显示          单系统显示： 53

title: 53/52: Low Pressure Sensor Fault (Dual System)
summary: For dual systems, fault code 53 indicates low pressure sensor fault for system 1, and 52 for system 2.

structured_payload.meaning: Low pressure sensor fault for system 1 (53) and system 2 (52)

title: ER41-ER51: Temperature Sensor Faults
summary: Fault codes ER41, ER42, ER43, ER45, ER46, ER47, ER48, ER49, ER51 (single system) and additional codes for dual systems indicate temperature sensor faults.

structured_payload.fault_code: ER41, ER42, ER43, ER45, ER46, ER47, ER48, ER49, ER51

evidence_quote: 主机数码管显示       单系统显示： ER41、ER42、ER43、ER45、ER46、ER47、ER48、ER49、ER51

title: High Discharge Temperature Trip Threshold
summary: The compressor trips on high discharge temperature at 125°C for single systems and 130°C for dual systems.
evidence_quote: 压缩机的排气温度超过 125℃（单系统） 、 130℃（双系统）

title: Emergency Operation Low Pressure Threshold
summary: Emergency operation is activated if low pressure drops below 3.3 bar for 60 seconds after compressor has run for two minutes.
evidence_quote: 压缩机运行两分钟后，低压 低于3.3 bar持续60s

title: Low Superheat Trip Threshold
summary: Low superheat fault is triggered if superheat is below 2°C for 5 minutes (single system) or below 1°C for 5 minutes (dual system).

structured_payload.value: Below 2°C for 5 min (single), below 1°C for 5 min (dual)

evidence_quote: 单系统： 过热度低于 2℃持续5分钟 双系统：过热 度低于1℃持续5分钟

title: High Suction Temperature Trip Threshold
summary: High suction temperature fault is triggered if suction temperature exceeds 40°C for 10 seconds.

title: Refrigerant Leak Low Pressure Threshold (Dual System)
summary: For dual systems, a refrigerant leak is indicated if low pressure drops below 1.8 bar (or 3.6 bar for R410A) during startup.
evidence_quote: 制冷/制热开机时，当低压低于 1.8(R410A 为3.6bar)bar

title: System Fault (ER23) Trigger Conditions
summary: System fault ER23 is triggered by three occurrences of low pressure, high pressure, high discharge temperature, or fan overload alarms.

structured_payload.trigger_conditions: 3 low pressure alarms, 3 high pressure alarms, 3 high discharge temperature alarms, or 3 fan overload alarms

evidence_quote: 机组出现 3次低压报警 机组出现 3次高压报警 机组出现３次排气温度过高 机组出现 3次风机过载

title: Check Communication Wiring for F6 Fault
summary: For F6 fault, check if communication wires A/B are reversed or disconnected.

structured_payload.step: Check if communication wires A/B are reversed or disconnected

evidence_quote: 线控器与主机的通讯线 A/B是否接反 通讯线是否断开

title: Check Slave Unit Power and Address for ECXX Fault
summary: For ECXX fault, check if the slave unit control board is powered and if the address dip switches are set correctly.

structured_payload.step: Check slave unit control board power and address dip switch settings

evidence_quote: XX号从机控制板是否上电 从机的地址拨码设置错误

title: Check Compressor Overload Protection Wiring
summary: For compressor overload fault, check if the overload protection device wiring is correctly connected to the main control board.

structured_payload.step: Check overload protection device wiring connection to main control board

evidence_quote: 保护装置连接线没有正确连接到主控制板

title: Check Fan Motor for High Discharge Temperature
summary: For high discharge temperature fault, check if the fan motor is damaged (in cooling mode).

structured_payload.step: Check fan motor for damage in cooling mode

title: Check Water System for Low Leaving Water Temperature
summary: For low leaving water temperature fault, check water system for low flow rate causing large temperature difference.

structured_payload.step: Check water system for low flow rate causing large temperature difference

evidence_quote: 水流量偏小以至水温差大

title: Check Four-Way Valve for High Suction Temperature
summary: For high suction temperature fault, check if the four-way valve slider is stuck in the middle.

structured_payload.step: Check if four-way valve slider is stuck in the middle

title: Check Low Pressure Sensor Wiring for ER53 Fault
summary: For low pressure sensor fault, check if the three wires of the low pressure sensor are reversed.

structured_payload.step: Check low pressure sensor wiring for reversal

evidence_quote: 低压传感器的三条线是否 接反

title: Check Temperature Sensor Connection for ER41-ER51 Faults
summary: For temperature sensor faults, check if the temperature sensor is disconnected or not properly plugged in.

structured_payload.step: Check temperature sensor connection and plugging

evidence_quote: 温度传感器脱落或没有插好
